reason_codes.summary: Investigate suspected wrong-patient binding or release.
Investigate a patient-safety, urgent-diversion, booking, or pharmacy incident.
Investigate a security, access, or policy violation with scope-bounded evidence.
Trace disclosures, exports, or lifecycle actions for a bounded data-subject question.
Investigate recovery posture, replay divergence, or continuity drift affecting safe operation.
Prepare a governed regulator, legal, or assurance export from the admissible evidence graph.

rules.title: Investigation scope envelope is mandatory
rules.masking_ceiling_rule: Every break-glass, replay, and export flow binds one current masking ceiling and disclosure ceiling before materialization.
rules.selected_anchor_rule: One selected anchor and one diagnostic question remain in scope until the envelope is superseded.
rules.mutation_rule: Read-only; no live mutation controls may arm under break-glass review.
rules.expiry_rule: The session must carry explicit expiresAt and auto-revoke on expiry or supersession.
rules.restore_rule: On exit, invalidate cached detailed payloads and require ordinary route re-materialization.
rules.export_rule: Export remains separately governed and may not inherit broader detail than the current envelope allows.
rules.notes: This is the core rule that stops break-glass from becoming a role flag or session-local scope drift.
source_refs: phase-9-the-assurance-ledger.md#9C. Audit explorer, break-glass review, and support replay

rules.title: Support replay pivots rather than widening in place
rules.masking_ceiling_rule: Support replay stays at masked timeline detail unless a governance-governed investigation envelope supersedes it.
rules.selected_anchor_rule: The pivot preserves checkpoint hash, selected anchor, and diagnostic question.
rules.mutation_rule: Replay, observe, and break-glass remain read-only, mutually explicit, and restore through settlement before live work resumes.
rules.expiry_rule: Support pivots inherit the envelope expiresAt and auto-revoke requirements.
rules.restore_rule: Held drafts and pending mutations stay outside replay evidence and require restore settlement before re-entry.
rules.export_rule: Support export is not ordinary ticket export; it uses the investigation export bundle controls.
rules.notes: Prevents support restore paths from broadening scope or drifting chronology.
source_refs: forensic-audit-findings.md#Finding 100 - Support replay and observe return still had no authoritative restore gate

rules.title: No post-hydration widening
rules.masking_ceiling_rule: A lower-trust materialized payload cannot be widened after browser delivery; a new purpose row must be re-materialized server-side.
rules.selected_anchor_rule: Anchor and envelope hashes must change when a new scope is compiled.
rules.mutation_rule: No client-side reveal or UI collapse counts as deeper lawful disclosure, and break-glass remains read-only until a new server-side row is materialized.
rules.expiry_rule: Older lower-trust payloads remain stale, expire immediately, and must be invalidated when the new row is materialized.
rules.restore_rule: Cache demotion is mandatory whenever the envelope or purpose row changes.
rules.export_rule: Exports derive from the new envelope only; they cannot reuse a cached browser payload.
rules.notes: Directly closes the payload-trimmed-after-hydration and UI-collapse-is-privacy gaps.
source_refs: forensic-audit-findings.md#Finding 87 - The audit did not bind patient projections to a single visibility and consistency envelope

rules.title: Wrong-patient hold suppresses cached PHI
rules.masking_ceiling_rule: When IdentityRepairFreezeRecord is active, only recovery-safe summary or governance investigation rows remain lawful.
rules.selected_anchor_rule: The active lineage, repair case, and freeze record stay explicit in the scope envelope.
rules.mutation_rule: All writable actions stay blocked and the route remains read-only until IdentityRepairReleaseSettlement or governed compensation completes.
rules.expiry_rule: Cached PHI expires immediately on hold entry and may not revive on refresh.
rules.restore_rule: Resume requires revalidation against current binding, session epoch, and repair settlement.
rules.export_rule: Repair evidence exports stay envelope-bound and preserve freeze or release proof explicitly.
rules.notes: Makes wrong-patient suppression explicit across browser, replay, and support restore paths.

rules.title: Retention witnesses stay separate from ordinary docs
rules.masking_ceiling_rule: Deletion and archive witnesses expose governance-safe summaries unless the envelope explicitly needs supporting evidence detail.
rules.selected_anchor_rule: Exports bind witness ids, graph hash, and scope question rather than free-form evidence browsing.
rules.mutation_rule: Retention witness review is read-only in this model.
rules.expiry_rule: Witness exports are bound to the active completeness verdict and expire when superseded.
rules.restore_rule: Return to governance shell preserves the same evidence pack anchor and disposition state.
rules.export_rule: No witness becomes a patient-downloadable artifact by convenience.
rules.notes: Separates retention and deletion evidence from ordinary records UX.

global_principles: Break-glass is a governed purpose-of-use row, not a role flag.
The same InvestigationScopeEnvelope binds audit search, replay, break-glass review, and export.
Ordinary support, ops, and patient sessions never widen an already materialized payload in place.
Break-glass remains read-only and time-bound through explicit expiry and restore requirements.
source_refs: phase-9-the-assurance-ledger.md#9C. Audit explorer, break-glass review, and support replay
